ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fishing_trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fishing trip */,
  "date_start" TEXT /* Start date of the fishing trip */,
  "date_end" TEXT /* End date of the fishing trip */,
  "gear" TEXT /* Type of gear used (e.g., Drift, Trawl) */,
  "stratum" TEXT /* Stratum or geographic area where fishing took place */,
  "mesh_size" REAL /* Mesh size of the fishing net */,
  "line_length" INTEGER /* Length of the fishing line in meters */,
  "trip_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the fishing trip */,
  "trip_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the fishing trip */,
  "soak_time_min" INTEGER /* Duration of the fishing activity in minutes (soak time) */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel used for the trip */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain who led the trip */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption during the trip */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_trips_gear FOREIGN KEY ("gear") REFERENCES gears ("gear_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_trips_stratum FOREIGN KEY ("stratum") REFERENCES strata ("stratum_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "catch_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catch record */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fishing trip the catch record belongs to */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the fish caught */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of fish caught */,
  "weight" REAL /* Total weight of the catch */,
  "average_length" REAL /* Average length of the fish caught */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the fish caught */,
  "capture_method" TEXT /* Method used to capture the fish */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catch_records_species FOREIGN KEY ("species") REFERENCES species ("species_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catch_records_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES fishing_trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "maximum_length" REAL /* Maximum length of the species */,
  "maximum_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gears" (
  "gear_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gear type */,
  "gear_type" TEXT /* Type of gear used (e.g., Drift, Trawl) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gear */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the gear */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the gear */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the gear */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gear_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strata" (
  "stratum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stratum */,
  "stratum_code" TEXT /* Code of the stratum */,
  "stratum_name" TEXT /* Name of the stratum */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the stratum is located */,
  "water_depth" REAL /* Average water depth in the stratum */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Average water temperature in the stratum */,
  "oxygen_level" REAL /* Average oxygen level in the stratum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stratum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fleet manager, data analyst, compliance officer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
